description_long: This clinic is a single-story, modern healthcare building with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and a glass entrance door, allowing visibility into a waiting area with chairs. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a mix of smooth concrete or stucco walls and dark metal or composite framing. A paved walkway and a row of low-maintenance landscaping plants line the front, enhancing the building's curb appeal. The side and rear elevations have smaller, rectangular windows and a more utilitarian appearance, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story clinic with large glass windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped front walkway. The building features a clean, geometric design and a visible waiting area inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, glass entrance door, visible waiting area, and landscaped walkway.
description_view_1: Side view with smaller rectangular windows and a plain wall, showing the building's depth and rear extension.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, minimal windows, and stepped rear section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall, service entrance, and continuation of the paved walkway.
